name: OFACSDNSearch
description: Searches the OFAC Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) API for fuzzy name matches. Returns match results, highest score, and whether the party is a confirmed hit. Call this tool for every party screening request.

in_PartyName.description: Full legal name of the party to search in the OFAC SDN list

in_PartyType.description: Party type filter: Individual, Entity, Vessel, or Aircraft. Empty string searches all.

in_MinScore.description: Minimum fuzzy match score threshold (0-100). Default 85.

out_MatchResultsJson.description: Raw JSON response from OFAC SDN API containing all match results

out_IsHit.description: True if any SDN matches were found at or above the minimum score threshold

out_HighestMatchScore.description: Highest fuzzy match score found (0-100). 0 if no matches.
